items.name: aurora-tokens
items.title: Aurora Design System Tokens
items.description: Aurora CSS custom property token definitions for the full Aurora color, typography, shadow, and radius system.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
items.docs:
Install this first.

It provides the Aurora token layer, shadcn token bridge, and base theme helpers used by the rest of the registry.

Import the generated stylesheet once at your app root before installing Aurora UI or block items.

theme.font-aurora-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace

dark.aurora-active-glow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, #29b6f6 28%, transparent), 0 2px 8px color-mix(in srgb, #29b6f6 18%, transparent)
dark.aurora-font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace
dark.aurora-shell-bg: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 0%, rgba(41, 182, 246, 0.09), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 0%, rgba(28, 127, 172, 0.10), transparent 24%), var(--aurora-page-bg)

light.aurora-shell-bg: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 0%, rgba(2, 136, 209, 0.06), transparent 28%), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 0%, rgba(1, 87, 155, 0.05), transparent 24%), var(--aurora-page-bg)

items.name: aurora-components
items.title: Aurora Component Styles
items.description: Aurora component base styles in @layer aurora-components, ordered before Tailwind utilities so utilities can override them. Required by all Aurora UI and block components. Replaces the old per-component runtime <style> injection.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
items.docs: Install after aurora-tokens. Provides the @layer aurora-components base styles for all Aurora components. Your app must declare the layer order: @layer theme, base, components, aurora-components, utilities;

items.name: aurora-fonts
items.title: Aurora Hosted Fonts
items.description: Hosted Manrope, Inter, Noto Sans, and JetBrains Mono @font-face declarations for Aurora typography tokens.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
items.docs:
Install after aurora-tokens when the consuming app should use Aurora-hosted webfonts instead of system fallbacks.

Import this stylesheet before aurora-tokens or alongside it at the app root.

items.name: aurora-button
items.title: Aurora Button
items.description: Multi-variant button with aurora glow, rose, neutral, ghost, and destructive styles. Inline-style gradients and box-shadow glows.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>

Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/button.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`.

items.name: aurora-code-workspace
items.title: Aurora Code Workspace
items.description: IDE-style split-pane workspace combining a FileTree explorer rail (with Explorer header and right border) and a flush-embedded CodeEditor. Selecting a file node in the tree swaps the active file shown in the editor. Ships as one bordered container with no double border between rail and editor.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>

Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/code-workspace.tsx`.

items.name: aurora-web-preview
items.title: Aurora Web Preview
items.description: Browser chrome component with Aurora panel titlebar, three neutral square window dots, address bar with lock icon, reload and share icon buttons. Four variants: browser (full chrome), unfurl-card (link preview with favicon, title, description, domain chip), skeleton (shimmer loading), and error (failed to load).

items.name: aurora-login
items.title: Aurora Login
items.description: Full-page login card centered on Aurora radial page wash. Features Labby stacked-plane mark + wordmark, email/password fields with show/hide toggle, Style D glow-border sign-in button, forgot password link, magic-link sent state with envelope icon, and 6-box OTP input that auto-advances on keystroke for 2FA.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
items.docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/login.tsx`.

items.name: aurora-oauth
items.title: Aurora OAuth
items.description: OAuth consent screen with app icon, scope checklist (sensitive scopes highlighted in warn color), and Allow/Deny buttons. Success/callback state with animated SVG check and close-window message. Token management table with token name, scopes chips, created date, last used, and Revoke button.
items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>

Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

items.name: aurora-error-page

items.author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>

items.name: aurora-command-palette
